query:
-- Gumdale Medical Center: billing item BI00746 = $288.00 (6 channels × $48/ch)
-- Cost is $214.30 vs billing item $288.00 → revenue should be $288.00
UPDATE services SET monthlyRevenue = 288.00 WHERE externalId = 'S72C54J';

-- Stafford Heights Medical Practice: billing item BI00736 = $192.00 (4 channels × $48/ch)
-- Cost is $192.00 vs billing item $192.00 → revenue should be $192.00
UPDATE services SET monthlyRevenue = 192.00 WHERE externalId = 'SHU42OX';

-- Coastal Dental Specialists: billing item BI00685 = $150.00 (5 Users Capped)
-- Cost is $90.65 vs billing item $150.00 → revenue should be $150.00
UPDATE services SET monthlyRevenue = 150.00 WHERE externalId = 'S8JR3KM';

-- Logan Central Family Clinic: billing item BI00811 = $129.00 (3 channels × $43/ch)
-- Cost is $140.00 vs billing item $129.00 → genuine -7.9% margin, cost > revenue
-- The $43/ch rate is below the standard $53/ch - this is a real pricing issue, leave as-is

-- Doctors at Kawana Shopping World: billing item BI00637 = $36.00 (4 channels SIP)
-- Cost is $73.22 vs billing item $36.00 → the cost of $73.22 seems wrong for 4 channels
-- Standard 4-channel outbound = 4 × $53 = $212. The $73.22 may be a partial/legacy cost.
-- Flag for manual review - do not change

-- Logan Medical (Cleveland Medical): billing item BI00712 = eFax $35.00
-- Cost is $80.00 vs eFax $35.00 → wrong service matched. The $80 cost is a PBX/SIP cost
-- matched to an eFax billing item. Flag for manual review.

-- Aspley FirstCDocAdmin: billing item BI00631 = Inbound $27.00
-- Cost is $37.40 vs inbound $27.00 → this is an admin/ATA device, not a SIP channel
-- The $37.40 cost is correct for an ATA adapter. Revenue should match actual billing.
-- Flag for manual review.

-- Services with $0 revenue and no billing items - need manual matching:
-- SEJX1FL (Creek St Pharmacy sthsidemed) - $144.93 cost, no billing item
-- SKSZDDG (Allegra AllegraApHB) - $135.25 cost, no billing item  
-- SD5S22R (Smile IT RVC PBX USER) - $135.11 cost, no billing item
-- SVFZ32A (Wide Bay Transport WidebayTransport) - $70.00 cost, no billing item
-- SNCXJ3U (Complete Care Doctors ComplCDocATA) - $36.01 cost, no billing item

SELECT 'Updates applied' as status;
